title: Norwegian Speaking IT Customer Support Specialist

summary.lv: Vivicta (bijusi Tietoevry Tech Services) meklē IT klientu atbalsta speciālistu ar norvēģu valodas prasmēm, kas pievienosies Servicedesk komandai un sniegs IT atbalstu Norvēģijas klientiem.
summary.en: Vivicta (formerly Tietoevry Tech Services) is hiring a Norwegian-speaking IT Customer Support Specialist to join its Servicedesk team and provide IT support to Norwegian customers.
